creator: fbsd@opal.com
text:
I am the maintainer of the graphics/epsonscan2 and graphics/epsonscan2-non-free-plugin ports.

The file /usr/local/etc/sane.d/dll.d/epsonscan2 is indeed installed by the graphics/epsonscan2 port.

I am away from the location where we have our Epson scanner at the moment, so cannot test this right now.  However, I am pretty sure it was working on FreeBSD-14.1 last time I was there using both scanimage and also /usr/local/bin/epsonscan2.

I will be there again next week, so can review this more then.
